name: Smoked Sausage and Lentil Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5 to 7 quart pan over medium heat, cook sausage until brown. Remove and set aside. Add oil to the drippings in the pan to make 1/3 cup fat. Add flour; stir until mixture is red-brown, about 10 minutes.
2. Add celery, garlic, onion, and carrots; cook stirring until vegetables begin to soften, about 3 minutes. Return reserved sausage to the pan. Add chicken broth, lentils, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, and cayenne. Bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce to a simmer, cover, and cook until lentils are soft when pressed, about 40 minutes.
